problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
